Ludio Divina is an application of the concept of [[Lectio Divina]] to [[videogames]].<ref name=":0">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Syt76ZvXK6k</ref>

The idea is to manifest the [[being mode]] in videogames.<ref name=":0" />

== References ==

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Lusio Divina]][[Category:Videogames]]
[[sn:Lusio Divina]]
[[Category:Pages]]
